headline: Is LyondellBasell A Good Income Play Now?
summary: LyondellBasell no longer offers a high dividend yield following a 50% dividend cut. Click here to read my most recent analysis of LYB stock.

headline: ‘Historic’ Plastic Price Hikes Are Pushing Companies to the Edge
summary: Rising oil prices are tightening plastic supply and driving costs to historic highs, experts warn. Can companies absorb the blow?
